commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the embedded agent tool-result char estimator to size harness-role messages from provider-rendered content and adds focused estimator plus guard regression tests.

PR surface: Source +47, Tests +147. Total +194 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main still estimates the affected harness roles as a flat fallback before convertToLlm expands them into provider-visible text, and the linked issue provides a concrete guard-level reproduction path; I did not run that repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Hold for contributor-supplied real behavior proof and normal maintainer/CI review; ClawSweeper repair should not substitute proof for the external contributor setup.

target.title: fix(agents): estimate harness role message chars from rendered text in context guard [AI-assisted]
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #97927 â€” the in-loop context-overflow guard undercounts messages with harness roles (`bashExecution`, `compactionSummary`, `branchSummary`, `custom`) by returning a flat **256 characters** for any role that isn't `user`, `assistant`, or `toolResult`. Since `convertToLlm` expands each harness role into a full-text user message, the guard runs on un-expanded messages and never trips overflow protection for summary- or bash-dominated transcripts.

## Why This Change Was Made

`estimateMessageChars` in `tool-result-char-estimator.ts` had a fallthrough `return 256` for all unrecognized roles. Harness roles store their payload for compaction/branch, so existing branches returned 0 and fell through to the flat 256. This mirrors the same bug fixed in PR #97861 in the twin estimator `estimateMessageTokenPressure`.

## Evidence

**Before/After â€” guard now sees real rendered text instead of flat 256:**

```
bashExecution (400 lines of output):
  BEFORE (flat fallback): 256 chars
  AFTER  (rendered text): 6862 chars  â†’  26.8x larger

compactionSummary (~2300 chars of summary text):
  BEFORE (flat fallback): 256 chars
  AFTER  (rendered text): 2230 chars  â†’  8.7x larger

branchSummary (~60 chars of summary):
  BEFORE (flat fallback): 256 chars
  AFTER  (rendered text): 162 chars

custom ("custom content string"):
  BEFORE (flat fallback): 256 chars
  AFTER  (content length): 21 chars

bashExecution (excludeFromContext):
  BEFORE (flat fallback): 256 chars
  AFTER  (excluded):      0 chars
```

Without the fix, an agent loop with 20 bash executions of 7000 chars each would report 20 Ă— 256 = 5,120 chars to the guard, while the model actually receives 20 Ă— 7,000 = 140,000 chars â€” silently overflowing context. After the fix, the guard sees the true rendered text and correctly triggers overflow protection.

**Guard integration tests** (`tool-result-context-guard.test.ts`):

| Test | Window | Rendered chars | Result |
|------|--------|---------------|--------|
| bashExecution (400 lines output) | 500 tokens (~1700 budget) | ~6862 chars | âś… Overflows |
| compactionSummary (30Ă— repeated sentence) | 500 tokens (~1700 budget) | ~2230 chars | âś… Overflows |
| bashExecution with excludeFromContext | 500 tokens | 0 (excluded) | âś… Passes through |

**Test suite:**

```
pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/tool-result-char-estimator.test.ts \
         src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/tool-result-context-guard.test.ts

char-estimator:  9 passed (6 new)
context-guard:  48 passed (3 new)
Total:          57 passed
```
target.author: gary-jia-new
